title: stelis farinosa
intro: Stelis farinosa, also known as the yellow orchid or farinose stelis, is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its chemical compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Stelis farinosa include its potential to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. In herbal preparations, Stelis farinosa is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is also incorporated into traditional medicines in various cultures.
